PowerPointTemplates v1.0.0

Usage
  dotnet PowerPointTemplates.dll [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help             Shows help text. 
  --version             Shows version information. 

Commands
  dump                  Generate values file base on the template document
  transform             Transform template document using values

You can run `dotnet PowerPointTemplates.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Generate values file base on the template document

Usage
  dotnet PowerPointTemplates.dll dump <templatedocument> [options]

Parameters
* templatedocument      Template document 

Options
  -o|--outputFile       Output file 
  -h|--help             Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Transform template document using values

Usage
  dotnet PowerPointTemplates.dll transform <templatedocument> --valuesFile <value> [options]

Parameters
* templatedocument      Template document 

Options
* -v|--valuesFile       File with values for placeholders replacement 
  -e|--exportSlides     Export every slide into a separated file in a specified format like: JPG, PNG. 
  -o|--outDir           Export output directory 
  -s|--save             Save transformed document Default: "False".
  -f|--saveFileName     Save transformed document 
  -l|--leaveOpen        Leave document open Default: "False".
  -h|--help             Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Transform template document using values

Usage
  dotnet PowerPointTemplates.dll transform <templatedocument> --valuesFile <value> [options]

Parameters
* templatedocument      Template document 

Options
* -v|--valuesFile       File with values for placeholders replacement 
  -e|--exportSlides     Export every slide into a separated file in a specified format like: JPG, PNG. 
  -o|--outDir           Export output directory 
  -s|--save             Save transformed document Default: "False".
  -f|--saveFileName     Save transformed document 
  -l|--leaveOpen        Leave document open Default: "False".
  -h|--help             Shows help text.
